title: 'Tech Neck' Is Real: 5 Physiotherapy-Approved Exercises for Office Workers
excerpt: Constant screen time is leading to a rise in neck and shoulder pain. Our certified physiotherapists share five simple yet effective exercises you can do at your desk to combat 'tech neck' and improve your posture.
content: This article would provide illustrated, step-by-step guides for five simple exercises like chin tucks and shoulder blade squeezes. It would serve as a great lead magnet and link back to the Physiotherapy service page and a call-to-action to book an ergonomic assessment.
